<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace1d"></a>

# AnimationNodeBlendSpace1D

**Inherits:** [AnimationRootNode](class_animationrootnode.md#class-animationrootnode) **<** [AnimationNode](class_animationnode.md#class-animationnode) **<** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

A set of [AnimationRootNode](class_animationrootnode.md#class-animationrootnode)s placed on a virtual axis, crossfading between the two adjacent ones. Used by [AnimationTree](class_animationtree.md#class-animationtree).

## Description

A resource used by [AnimationNodeBlendTree](class_animationnodeblendtree.md#class-animationnodeblendtree).

**AnimationNodeBlendSpace1D** represents a virtual axis on which any type of [AnimationRootNode](class_animationrootnode.md#class-animationrootnode)s can be added using [add_blend_point()](#class-animationnodeblendspace1d-method-add-blend-point). Outputs the linear blend of the two [AnimationRootNode](class_animationrootnode.md#class-animationrootnode)s adjacent to the current value.

You can set the extents of the axis with [min_space](#class-animationnodeblendspace1d-property-min-space) and [max_space](#class-animationnodeblendspace1d-property-max-space).

## Tutorials

- [Using AnimationTree](../tutorials/animation/animation_tree.md)

## Enumerations

<a id="enum-animationnodeblendspace1d-blendmode"></a>

enum **BlendMode**: [🔗](#enum-animationnodeblendspace1d-blendmode)

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace1d-constant-blend-mode-interpolated"></a>

[BlendMode](#enum-animationnodeblendspace1d-blendmode) **BLEND_MODE_INTERPOLATED** = `0`

The interpolation between animations is linear.

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace1d-constant-blend-mode-discrete"></a>

[BlendMode](#enum-animationnodeblendspace1d-blendmode) **BLEND_MODE_DISCRETE** = `1`

The blend space plays the animation of the animation node which blending position is closest to. Useful for frame-by-frame 2D animations.

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace1d-constant-blend-mode-discrete-carry"></a>

[BlendMode](#enum-animationnodeblendspace1d-blendmode) **BLEND_MODE_DISCRETE_CARRY** = `2`

Similar to [BLEND_MODE_DISCRETE](#class-animationnodeblendspace1d-constant-blend-mode-discrete), but starts the new animation at the last animation's playback position.

---

-  **set_snap**(value: [float](class_float.md#class-float))

[bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **sync** = `false` [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace1d-property-sync)

-  **set_use_sync**(value: [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool))
- [bool](class_bool.md#class-bool) **is_using_sync**()

If `false`, the blended animations' frame are stopped when the blend value is `0`.

If `true`, forcing the blended animations to advance frame.

## Method Descriptions

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace1d-method-add-blend-point"></a>

 **add_blend_point**(node: [AnimationRootNode](class_animationrootnode.md#class-animationrootnode), pos: [float](class_float.md#class-float), at_index: [int](class_int.md#class-int) = -1) [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace1d-method-add-blend-point)

Adds a new point that represents a `node` on the virtual axis at a given position set by `pos`. You can insert it at a specific index using the `at_index` argument. If you use the default value for `at_index`, the point is inserted at the end of the blend points array.

---

<a id="class-animationnodeblendspace1d-method-get-blend-point-count"></a>

[int](class_int.md#class-int) **get_blend_point_count**()  [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace1d-method-get-blend-point-count)

Returns the number of points on the blend axis.

---

[AnimationRootNode](class_animationrootnode.md#class-animationrootnode) **get_blend_point_node**(point: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace1d-method-get-blend-point-node)

Returns the [AnimationNode](class_animationnode.md#class-animationnode) referenced by the point at index `point`.

---

[float](class_float.md#class-float) **get_blend_point_position**(point: [int](class_int.md#class-int))  [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace1d-method-get-blend-point-position)

Returns the position of the point at index `point`.

---

 **remove_blend_point**(point: [int](class_int.md#class-int)) [🔗](#class-animationnodeblendspace1d-method-remove-blend-point)
